case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. PIERRE BRAUN et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT BRAUN, PIERRE DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT OF POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION SERVED MAY-06-2013, POSTING AND MAILING AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TENDERLOIN NEIGHBOORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRAUN, PIERRE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 216 EDDY STREET, #304, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. 94102, ** INCLUDING ANY/ALL UNKNOWN OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES ** SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
